title: Zan Village Candle Company Taper Dinner Candles, 10 Pack, Long-Lasting 7-Hour Burn Time, Classic Long Venetian Style, Unscented, Dripless Candling, Made in The UK - Silver
features: Elegant tapered candles - The perfect dinner candles for table decorations can be used for wedding centrepieces, fancy dinners, decorate your living room or living room or simply create elegance for your visiting friends.

CLEAN, DRIP-FREE DESIGN - One of the more convenient aspects of our handmade taper candles is that they don't drip and make a mess like most votive candles, so you can use them as centerpieces or at buffet tables without leaving hard wax.

BRILLIANT COLORS FOR ANY STYLE - These tapered candles are available in a variety of popular colours to suit all your personal and professional events, including gold, white, red, silver, black and much more. You will love using them for all your celebrations.
PREMIUM BURNING TIME - Our thin candles burn for approx. 7 hours which means they can be used again and again for dinners, events and many other events so you can get the most out of everyone.
Based in the UK - a small business owned and operated in the UK. We manufacture all of our wax melts directly here by hand and have sold over 20 million candles to people all over the country.
description: Product Description Smokeless Wicks Our tapered dinner candles use a high-quality cotton wick that burns cleanly without creating smoke, so you can relax and enjoy the soft glow. Dripless, Mess-Free These candles are dripless, so under normal circumstances, they won't leave a mess when they finish burning. External factors, such as lighting several candles in close proximity, or windy conditions can cause them to drip. 7 Hour Burn Time Meticulously made using top-quality wax these slow-burning candles will burn for up to seven hours, which should be enough to last the full extent of your event. Several Colour Options Choose from a variety of colours to match the colour scheme of your dinner. We currently offer our dinner candles in eight popular colours.
